parameters.name: pNewTargetParameters
parameters.description: 指向 描述模式的DXGI_MODE_DESC 结构的指针，该模式指定目标的新宽度、高度、格式和刷新率。 如果格式DXGI_FORMAT_UNKNOWN，ResizeTarget 将使用现有格式。 我们仅建议在交换链处于全屏模式时使用 DXGI_FORMAT_UNKNOWN ，因为此方法不是线程 安全的。返回值类型： HRESULT 返回指示成功或失败的代码。 如果在调用此 API 时发生全屏/窗口模式转换，则返回 DXGI_STATUS_MODE_CHANGE_IN_PROGRESS。 有关其他 DXGI 错误代码，请参阅 DXGI_ERROR 。 Fullscreen 类型： BOOL 一个布尔值，指定是将显示状态设置为开窗还是全屏。 TRUE 表示全屏 ，FALSE 表示 窗 口化。 pTarget 类型：[in，可选] IDXGIOutput* 如果将 TRUE 传递给 全屏 参数以将显示状态设置为全屏，则可以选择将此参数设置为指向包含交换链的输出目标的 IDXGIOutput 接口的指针。 如果将此参数设置为 NULL， DXGI 将根据交换链的设备和输出窗口的位置选择输出。 如果将 FALSE 传递给 全屏，则必须将此参数设置为 NULL。

entities.remarks: 主要用于交换链操作中，当不希望改变现有格式时使用此值。在全屏模式下使用时需要特别注意线程安全问题。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R32G32_FLOAT

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16B16A16_FLOAT
entities.description: A four-component, 64-bit floating-point format that supports 16 bits per channel (including alpha). DXGI_FORMAT value: 10.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16_SNORM
entities.description: 一种双分量32位有符号规范化整数格式，支持红色通道16位和绿色通道16位。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16B16A16_SNORM
entities.description: A four-component, 64-bit signed normalized integer format that supports 16 bits per channel including alpha.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16B16A16_UNORM
entities.description: A four-component, 64-bit unsigned-normalized-integer format that supports 16 bits per channel including alpha. Supported view types are SRV and UAV. For Direct3D 11.1: This value is not supported until Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16_UNORM
entities.description: A two-component, 16-bit unsigned normalized integer format. Supported view types are SRV, RTV, and UAV. For luminance data view, the mapping is Y->R16. For chrominance data view, the mapping is U->R16 and V->G16. Width and height must be even. Direct3D 11 staging resources and initData parameters for this format use (rowPitch * (height + (height / 2))) bytes.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R10G10B10A2_UNORM
entities.description: A four-component, 32-bit unsigned-normalized-integer format that supports 10 bits for each color channel and 2 bits for alpha.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_UNORM
entities.description: A four-component, 32-bit unsigned-normalized-integer format that supports 8 bits per channel including alpha. This Direct3D hardware behavior is legacy and may not be useful anymore. For video rendering with YUV formats, see Recommended 8-Bit YUV Formats for Video Rendering. Width must be even. Direct3D 11.1: This value is not supported prior to Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8_UNORM
entities.description: Two-component unsigned 8-bit normalized integer format

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_SNORM

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8_SNORM
entities.description: A two-component, 16-bit signed normalized integer format that supports 8 bits for the red channel and 8 bits for the green channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R32G32B32_TYPELESS

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R32G32B32_UINT

entities.name: DXGI_ERROR_NAME_ALREADY_EXISTS
entities.description: The name of the resource to be shared is already associated with another resource. Possible error codes: E_ACCESSDENIED if created in protected namespace, E_OUTOFMEMORY if insufficient memory, or other DXGI_ERROR codes. Note: On Windows 7 with Platform Update, CreateSharedHandle may fail with E_NOTIMPL.

return_value.description: Returns S_OK if successful; otherwise returns DXGI_ERROR_INVALID_CALL if parameters are invalid.

entities.remarks: CreateSharedHandle only returns NT handle when creating shared resource with D3D11_RESOURCE_MISC_SHARED_NTHANDLE flag set.

entities.name: DXGI_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED
entities.description: Indicates the operation is not supported. For example, 8bpp and non-DWM desktop modes are not supported. If DuplicateOutput1 fails with DXGI_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED, applications can wait for system notifications of desktop switches and mode changes, then call DuplicateOutput1 again after such notifications occur. See desktop switch (EVENT_SYSTEM_DESKTOPSWITCH) and mode change notifications (WM_DISPLAYCHANGE) for details. DXGI may also return this error when reaching maximum concurrent duplicate application limits.

There is no sign bit, and each channel has a shared 5-bit biased (15) exponent and a 9-bit mantissa. Bit layout: MSB E[31:27] B[26:18] G[17:9] R[8:0]

members.name: Budget
members.description: 指定应用程序应面向的 OS 提供的视频内存预算（以字节为单位）。 如果 CurrentUsage 大于 Budget，则应用程序可能会由于 OS 为其他应用程序提供公平使用视频内存的后台 活动而产生断断续续或性能损失。 CurrentUsage 指定应用程序的当前视频内存使用情况（以字节为单位）。 AvailableForReservation 应用程序可用于预留的视频内存量（以字节为单位）。 若要保留此视频内存，应用程序 应调用 IDXGIAdapter3：：SetVideoMemoryReservation。 CurrentReservation 应用程序保留的视频内存量（以字节为单位）。 OS 使用预留作为提示来确定应用程序的 最低工作集。 应用程序应尝试确保可以剪裁其视频内存使用量以满足此要求。

entities.name: DXGI_RESIDENCY_FULLY_RESIDENT
entities.description: Value: 1. Indicates the resource is fully resident in video memory.

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_NONPREROTATED
entities.description: 值：1 设置此标志以关闭自动图像旋转;也就是说，在将前缓冲区的内容传输到监视器时不执行旋转。使用此标志可避免在应用程序预期处理旋转时产生带宽损失。 此选项仅在全屏模式下有效。

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_ALLOW_MODE_SWITCH
entities.description: 值为2。设置此标志允许应用程序通过调用IDXGISwapChain::ResizeTarget切换显示模式。从窗口模式切换到全屏模式时，显示模式(或监视器分辨率)将匹配应用程序窗口的尺寸。

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_RESTRICTED_CONTENT
entities.description: Value: 8. Sets this flag to indicate the swap chain may contain protected content; therefore the operating system supports creating the swap chain only when driver and hardware protection is used. If driver and hardware do not support content protection, calls to create resources for the swap chain will fail. Direct3D 11: This enumeration value is supported starting with Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_RESTRICT_SHARED_RESOURCE_DRIVER
entities.description: 值为16的标志，指示交换链中创建的共享资源必须使用驱动程序的机制来限制对共享图面的访问。Direct3D 11：从Windows 8开始支持此标志。

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_FOREGROUND_LAYER
entities.description: 交换链标志来创建前台交换链。前台交换链还必须使用DXGI_ALPHA_MODE_PREMULTIPLIED alpha模式，并且必须使用DXGI_SCALING_NONE。预乘alpha表示在显示帧之前，每个像素的颜色值应已乘以alpha值。例如，一个Alpha值为50%的100%白色BGRA像素设置为(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5)。alpha预乘步骤可以在输出合并阶段完成，方法是应用混合状态(参见ID3D11BlendState)，并将D3D11_RENDER_TARGET_BLEND_DESC结构的SrcBlend字段设置为D3D11_SRC_ALPHA。如果未完成Alpha预乘步骤，前台交换链上的颜色会比预期明亮。如果硬件支持，前台交换链将使用多平面覆盖。调用IDXGIOutput2::SupportsOverlays查询适配器以获取覆盖支持。

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_HW_PROTECTED
entities.description: 值：1024。指示应创建交换链，以便所有基础资源都可以由硬件保护。如果不支持硬件内容保护，则资源创建将失败。此标志具有以下限制：只能与交换效果DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_SEQUENTIAL一起使用。注意：使用此标志创建交换链并不自动保证将为基础分配启用硬件保护，某些实现要求先初始化DRM组件。从Windows 10开始支持此枚举值。

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_RESTRICTED_TO_ALL_HOLOGRAPHIC_DISPLAYS
entities.description: Value: 4096. This flag indicates the swap chain is restricted to all holographic displays. Used by DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC/DESC1 structures and IDXGISwapChain::ResizeTarget method. Not needed for swap chains created in fullscreen mode using IDXGIFactory::CreateSwapChain.

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_GDI_COMPATIBLE
entities.description: Specifies that the swap chain should be GDI compatible. When this flag is set, you must explicitly use GetDC on the back buffer. After the first successful call to IDXGISwapChain1::Present1 on a flip-model swap chain, GDI can no longer be used with the HWND associated with this swap chain, even after the swap chain is destroyed. This restriction extends to methods like ScrollWindowEx. For details about flip-model swap chains and optimized presentations, see Enhancing Presentations with Flip Model, Dirty Rectangles, and Scroll Regions.

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_DISPLAY_ONLY
entities.description: 指定交换链内容仅用于显示，无法通过远程访问或桌面复制API访问。使用IDXGIFactory2创建方法时，设置此标志可保护交换链内容不被抓取。在全屏模式下，桌面复制API也无法访问内容。调用IDXGISwapChain::ResizeBuffers时可能会重置这些保护设置。

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_YUV_VIDEO
entities.description: Value: 512. Sets this flag to create a swap chain for YUV video. Note this enum value is supported starting with Windows 8.1.

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_ALLOW_TEARING
entities.description: 值：2048。撕裂支持是启用支持可变刷新率的显示器才能在应用程序呈现绑定到全屏无边框窗口的交换链时正常运行的要求。Win32应用已通过调用SetFullscreenState(TRUE)在全屏独占模式下实现撕裂，但Win32开发人员的建议方法是改用此撕裂标志。此标志需要使用DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_*交换效果。若要检查此功能的硬件支持，请参阅IDXGIFactory5::CheckFeatureSupport。有关使用情况信息，请参阅IDXGISwapChain::Present和DXGI_PRESENT标志。备注：IDXGISwapChain::ResizeBuffers不能用于添加或删除此标志。

parameters.name: pColor
parameters.description: 指向 DXGI_RGBA 结构的指针，该结构指定要设置的背景色。

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_SEQUENTIAL
entities.description: Value: 1. Specifies the bitblt model and indicates DXGI should preserve the contents of the back buffer after calling IDXGISwapChain1::Present1. Contents are presented sequentially from the first buffer (buffer 0) to the last buffer. Cannot be used with multisampling. Note: Not supported in Direct3D 12 - applications must use DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_SEQUENTIAL instead.

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_SEQUENTIAL
entities.description: 指定交换链使用翻转顺序演示模型。CreateSwapChainForComposition仅支持翻转演示文稿模型，且必须在DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC1的缩放成员中指定DXGI_SCALING_STRETCH值。

parameters.description: 指向输出接口的指针 (请参阅 IDXGIOutput) 。

parameters.description: 指向交换链说明的指针， (查看 DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC) 。

entities.remarks: 在DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC1结构的SwapEffect成员中设置此值，表示使用翻转顺序演示模型。

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_DISCARD
entities.description: DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_DISCARD是一种交换效果模式，用于DXGI交换链。在这种模式下，后台缓冲区的内容在呈现后被丢弃，不支持bitblt模型。D3D12不支持对后台缓冲区进行多重采样，必须手动执行多重采样。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC和DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC1结构使用。在D3D12中，仅支持DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_SEQUENTIAL和DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_DISCARD模式。

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_DISCARD
entities.description: Value: 0. This flag specifies the bitblt model and indicates that DXGI discards the back buffer contents after calling IDXGISwapChain1::Present1. Valid for swap chains with multiple back buffers, but applications only have read/write access to buffer 0. Allows the display driver to choose the most efficient presentation technique. Note: Not supported in Direct3D 12 (must use DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_SEQUENTIAL or DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_DISCARD). Behavior differs between Win32 and UWP apps - UWP apps are forced into FLIP swap mode for better memory efficiency.

entities.name: D3D11_BIND_RENDER_TARGET
entities.description: Specifies that a resource will be used as a render target.

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC1
entities.description: Describes a swap chain for use with DirectX graphics. Contains parameters such as buffer dimensions, format, and presentation settings.
entities.syntax:
HRESULT CreateSwapChainForHwnd(
[in]           IUnknown                              *pDevice,
[in]           HWND                                  hWnd,   [in]           const DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC1           *pDesc,
[in, optional] const DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FULLSCREEN_DESC *pFullscreenDesc,   [in, optional] IDXGIOutput                           *pRestrictToOutput,
[out]          IDXGISwapChain1                       **ppSwapChain);

parameters.name: pDevice
parameters.description: 对于 Direct3D 11 和早期版本的 Direct3D，这是指向交换链的 Direct3D 设备的指针。 对于 Direct3D 12，这是指向直接命令队列的指针， (引用 ID3D12CommandQueue) 。 此参 数不能为 NULL。[in] hWnd 与 CreateSwapChainForHwnd 创建的交换链关联的 HWND 句柄。 此参数不能为 NULL。[in] pDesc 指向交换链说明 DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC1 结构的指针。 此参数不能为 NULL。[in, optional] pFullscreenDesc 指向 DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FULLSCREEN_DESC 结构的指针，用于描述全屏交换链。 可以选择设置此参数以创建全屏交换链。 将其设置为 NULL 可创建窗口交换链。

parameters.name: pRestrictToOutput
parameters.description: 指向要限制内容的输出 的 IDXGIOutput 接口的指针。 还必须在 IDXGISwapChain1：:P resent1 调用中传递 DXGI_PRESENT_RESTRICT_TO_OUTPUT 标志，以强制内容在任何其他输出上显示为黑屏。 如果要将内容限制为不同的输出，则必须创建新的交换链。 但是，可以根据 DXGI_PRESENT_RESTRICT_TO_OUTPUT 标志有条件地限制内容。 如果不想将内容限制为输出目标，请将此参数设置为 NULL 。[out] ppSwapChain 指向变量的指针，该变量接收指向 CreateSwapChainForHwnd 创建的交换链的 IDXGISwapChain1 接口的指针。

return_value.description: S_OK指示接口受支持，否则 (返回DXGI_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED 有关详细信息，请参阅 DXGI_ERROR) 。 类型： HRESULT 指示成功或失败 (看到 DXGI_ERROR) 的代码。 如果索引大于输出数，则返回 DXGI_ERROR_NOT_FOUND。 如果适配器来自使用 D3D_DRIVER_TYPE_WARP 创建的设备，则适配器没有输出，因此返 回DXGI_ERROR_NOT_FOUND。

entities.remarks: 显示子系统通常称为视频卡，但在某些计算机上，显示子系统是主板的一部分。若要枚举显示子系统，请使用 IDXGIFactory：：EnumAdapters。 若要获取特定设备的适配器接口，请使用 IDXGIDevice：：GetAdapter。若要创建软件适配器，请使用 IDXGIFactory：：CreateSoftwareAdapter。 Windows Phone 8：支持此 API。 注意你只能使用 CheckInterfaceSupport 来检查 Direct3D 10.x 接口是否受支持，并 且只能在 Windows Vista SP1 及更高版本的操作系统上使用。 如果尝试使用 CheckInterfaceSupport 来检查是否支持 Direct3D 11.x 及更高版本的接口， CheckInterfaceSupport 将返回DXGI_ERROR_UNSUPPORTED。 因此，请勿使用 CheckInterfaceSupport。 相反，若要验证操作系统是否支持特定接口，请尝试创建接口。 例如，如果调用 ID3D11Device：：CreateBlendState 方法但失败，则操作系 统不支持 ID3D11BlendState 接口。 注意 如果在会话 0 进程中调用此 API，它将返回 DXGI_ERROR_NOT_CURRENTLY_AVAILABLE。 当 EnumOutputs 方法成功并使用指向输出接口的指针的地址填充 ppOutput 参数时， EnumOutputs 将递增输出接口的引用计数。 为了避免内存泄漏，使用完输出接口后，请调用 Release 方法以递减引用计数。 EnumOutputs 首先返回显示桌面主服务器的输出。 此输出对应于零的索引。 然后， EnumOutputs 返回其他输出。 示例枚举输出 下面是如何使用 EnumOutputs 枚举适配器上的所有输出的示例： UINT i = 0; IDXGIOutput * pOutput; std::vector<IDXGIOutput*> vOutputs;

entities.name: WAIT_ABANDONED

entities.remarks: The AcquireSync method creates a lock for surfaces shared across multiple devices, allowing only one device at a time to render to the surface. This method uses a key to determine which device currently has exclusive access to the surface. Uses the D3D10_RESOURCE_MISC_FLAG enumeration.

entities.name: DXGI_ERROR_DEVICE_REMOVED
entities.description: DXGI error code indicating the video device has been physically removed or the driver was upgraded.
entities.remarks: 从 Direct3D 11.1 开始，请考虑使用 IDXGISwapChain1：:P resent1，因为随后可以在交换链演示文稿中使用脏矩形和滚动矩形，因此使用更少的内存带宽和更少的系统电源。 有关在交换链演示文稿中使用脏矩形和滚动矩形的详细信息，请参阅在交换链演示文稿中使用脏矩形和滚动矩形。 若要在全屏应用程序中翻转交换链缓冲区时获得最佳性能，请参阅 全屏应用程序性能提示。 由于调用 Present 可能会导致呈现线程等待消息泵线程，因此在使用多个线程的应用程序中调用此方法时要小心。 有关更多详细信息，请参阅 多线程注意事项。 Direct3D 9 和 Direct3D 10 之间的差异： 在 Flags 参数中指定DXGI_PRESENT_TEST类似于 Direct3D 9 中的 IDirect3DDevice9：： TestCooperativeLevel。 对于使用DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_SEQUENTIAL或DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_DISCARD值设置创建的翻转演示文稿模型交换链，成功的演示文稿取消绑定缓冲区 0 (通常由 OMSetRenderTargets) 从图形管道设置，除非在 Flags 参数中传递 DXGI_PRESENT_DO_NOT_SEQUENCE标志。 有关向屏幕呈现内容时数据值如何变化的信息，请参阅 转换颜色空间的数据。翻转演示文稿模型队列 假设以下具有同步间隔值的帧在调用 Present 之前从最早 (A) 排队到最新 (E) 。 A：3、B：0、C：0、D：1、E：0 调用 Present 时，运行时仅显示 1 个垂直空白间隔的帧 A。 运行时会提前终止帧 A，因为帧 B 中的同步间隔为 0。然后，运行时显示 1 个垂直空白间隔的帧 D，然后显示 E 帧，直到提交新演示文稿。 运行时放弃帧 B 和 C。可变刷新率显示 启用撕裂是可变刷新率显示器的要求。 CheckFeatureSupport 方法可用于确定此功能是 否可用，若要设置所需的标志，请参阅DXGI_PRESENT_ALLOW_TEARING和 DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FLAG_ALLOW_TEARING的说明，并显示可变刷新率。

entities.name: DXGI_ERROR_NOT_CURRENTLY_AVAILABLE
entities.description: 操作失败错误码。当返回此错误时，应用程序可以继续在窗口模式下运行，稍后可再次尝试切换到全屏模式。常见原因包括：应用程序在终端服务器上运行、输出窗口被遮挡、无键盘焦点、其他应用已处于全屏模式等。
entities.remarks: 建议创建窗口交换链并通过SetFullscreenState切换全屏，而非强制全屏初始化。Windows应用商店应用调用SetFullscreenState会返回此错误。翻转演示模型在全屏转换后需调用ResizeBuffers。

entities.name: DXGI_ADAPTER_DESC2
entities.description: 介绍使用 Microsoft DirectX Graphics Infrastructure (DXGI) 1.2 的适配器 (或视频卡) 。

entities.name: DXGI_PRESENT_PARAMETERS
entities.description: Contains presentation parameters that help the operating system optimize presentation. Used by the Present1 method.
entities.syntax:
typedef struct DXGI_PRESENT_PARAMETERS {   UINT  DirtyRectsCount;
RECT  *pDirtyRects;   RECT  *pScrollRect;   POINT *pScrollOffset;
} DXGI_PRESENT_PARAMETERS; 成员
DirtyRectsCount
在显示的帧的后台缓冲区中更新的已更新矩形的数目。 操作系统使用此信息来优化演示
文稿。 可以将此成员设置为 0 以指示更新整个帧。 pDirtyRects
在显示的框架的后台缓冲区中更新的已更新矩形的列表。 应用程序必须更新它向运行时报告的每个矩形中的每个像素;应用程序不能假定像素是从上一帧保存的。 有关更新脏矩形的详细信息，请参阅备注。 如果 DirtyRectsCount 为 0，则可以将此成员设置为
NULL。 应用程序不得更新脏矩形之外的任何像素。 pScrollRect
指向滚动矩形的指针。 滚动矩形是上一帧的矩形，运行时位块从中传输 (位块) 内容。 运行时还使用滚动矩形来优化终端服务器和间接显示方案中的呈现。
滚动矩形还描述目标矩形，即当前框架上填充滚动内容的区域。 可以将此成员设置为
NULL ，以指示没有从上一帧滚动任何内容。 pScrollOffset
指向滚动区域的偏移量的指针，该偏移量从上一帧的源矩形 () 到当前帧) 的目标矩形 (。
可以将此成员设置为 NULL 以指示无偏移量。
entities.remarks: Present1 方法使用此结构。 滚动矩形和脏矩形列表可能会重叠。 在这种情况下，脏矩形优先。 然后，应用程序可以 在滚动区域的顶部包含动态内容。 例如，应用程序可以同时滚动页面并播放视频。下图和坐标演示了此示例。 Previous frame Old Text Video Back buffer before Present Video New line Legend: Presented frame Text Video New line syntax DirtyRectsCount = 2 Scroll rectangle Scroll offset Dirty rectangle pDirtyRects[ 0 ] = { 10, 30, 40, 50 } // Video pDirtyRects[ 1 ] = { 0, 70, 50, 80 } // New line *pScrollRect = { 0, 0, 50, 70 }*pScrollOffset = { 0, -10 } 将上一帧的各个部分和应用程序呈现的内容组合在一起，以生成操作系统在显示屏幕上显示的最终帧。 大部分窗口是从上一帧滚动的。 应用程序必须使用由于滚动而显示的新内容块更新视频帧。 虚线矩形显示当前框架中的滚动矩形。 滚动矩形由 pScrollRect 成员指定。 箭头显示滚动偏移量。 滚动偏移量由 pScrollOffset 成员指定。 填充矩形显示应用程序使用新内容更 新的脏矩形。 填充矩形由 DirtyRectsCount 和 pDirtyRects 成员指定。 “ DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_DISCARD 或 DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_SEQUENTIAL ”选项不支持滚动矩形和偏移量。 多重采样交换链不支持脏矩形和滚动矩形。 对于 bitblt 模型和翻转模型，组合的实际实现和必要的 bitblt 是不同的。 有关这些模型的详细信息，请参阅 DXGI 翻转模型。 有关翻转模型交换链和优化演示文稿的详细信息，请参阅使用翻转模型增强演示文稿、脏 矩形和滚动区域。

entities.name: DXGI_ALPHA_MODE
entities.description: 指定如何处理DXGI_RGBA结构的alpha成员值，实现窗口透明度控制。例如，如果AlphaMode为DXGI_ALPHA_MODE_IGNORE，则IDXGISwapChain1::Present1会忽略DXGI_RGBA的alpha成员。注意：建议在线性颜色空间中执行浮点运算。当桌面处于固定位颜色深度模式时，操作系统会将线性颜色数据转换为标准RGB数据(sRGB，gamma 2.2校正空间)组合到屏幕。

parameters.name: Rotation
parameters.description: 一个DXGI_MODE_ROTATION类型的值，该值指定如何为交换链设置后台缓冲区的旋转。

entities.name: DXGI_ALPHA_MODE_UNSPECIFIED
entities.description: Unspecified alpha mode (value = 0)

entities.name: DXGI_ALPHA_MODE_STRAIGHT
entities.description: 值为2，表示透明度行为未预乘(straight alpha)。alpha通道直接表示颜色的透明度。

entities.name: DXGI_ALPHA_MODE_FORCE_DWORD
entities.description: 值： 0xffffffff 强制此枚举编译为大小为 32 位。 如果没有此值，某些编译器将允许此枚举编译更改为 32 位以外的大小。 不使用此值。
entities.remarks: 有关 alpha 模式的详细信息，请参阅 D2D1_ALPHA_MODE。

entities.name: DXGI_ALPHA_MODE_PREMULTIPLIED
entities.description: 值为1，表示透明度行为是预乘的。每种颜色首先按alpha值缩放，alpha值本身在直乘和预乘alpha中是相同的。通常没有颜色通道值大于alpha通道值。如果预乘格式的颜色通道值大于alpha通道，则标准源间混合数学将产生加法混合。

entities.name: DXGI_ALPHA_MODE_IGNORE
entities.description: 值为3，表示忽略alpha通道（透明度）处理

entities.name: DXGI_COMPUTE_PREEMPTION_GRANUL
entities.description: 标识图形处理单元 (GPU) 可以抢占其当前计算任务的粒度。

entities.name: DXGI_COMPUTE_PREEMPTION_THREAD_GROUP_BOUNDARY
entities.description: Specifies thread group boundary preemption granularity for compute operations

entities.name: DXGI_COMPUTE_PREEMPTION_INSTRUCTION_BOUNDARY
entities.description: 指示作为线程中的计算指令的抢占粒度级别的常量值
entities.remarks: 调用 IDXGIAdapter2：：GetDesc2 方法以检索 GPU 可以抢占其当前计算任务的粒度级别。 操作系统在 DXGI_ADAPTER_DESC2 结构的 ComputePreemptionGranularity 成员中 指定计算粒度级别。

entities.name: DXGI_COMPUTE_PREEMPTION_DMA_BUFFER_BOUNDARY
entities.description: Specifies the DMA buffer boundary granularity for compute preemption.

entities.name: DXGI_COMPUTE_PREEMPTION_DISPATCH_BOUNDARY
entities.description: 值为1，表示抢占粒度以调度为单位（例如调用ID3D11DeviceContext::Dispatch方法）。调度是计算数据包的一部分。

entities.name: DXGI_COMPUTE_PREEMPTION_THREAD_BOUNDARY
entities.description: Specifies thread-level preemption granularity (value: 3). Indicates preemption occurs at thread boundaries within a thread group.

entities.name: DXGI_GRAPHICS_PREEMPTION_GRANU
entities.description: 指定GPU在执行图形呈现任务时可能被抢占的粒度级别

entities.name: DXGI_GRAPHICS_PREEMPTION_INSTRUCTION_BOUNDARY
entities.description: Specifies the preemption granularity level for graphics instructions (value: 4). Graphics instructions operate on pixels.
entities.remarks: Call IDXGIAdapter2::GetDesc2 method to retrieve the granularity level at which the GPU can preempt its current graphics rendering task. The operating system specifies the graphics granularity level in the GraphicsPreemptionGranularity member of DXGI_ADAPTER_DESC2 structure.

entities.name: DXGI_GRAPHICS_PREEMPTION_DMA_BUFFER_BOUNDARY
entities.description: Specifies that the preemption granularity is at DMA buffer boundary.

entities.name: DXGI_GRAPHICS_PREEMPTION_PRIMITIVE_BOUNDARY
entities.description: 值为1，表示图形抢占的粒度基于图元级别。图元是DMA缓冲区中的一个段，可以是一组三角形。

entities.name: DXGI_GRAPHICS_PREEMPTION_TRIANGLE_BOUNDARY
entities.description: Indicates preemption granularity at triangle level. A triangle is part of a primitive.

entities.name: DXGI_GRAPHICS_PREEMPTION_PIXEL_BOUNDARY
entities.description: Specifies the preemption granularity in terms of pixels. Value: 3 indicates the preemption granularity is at pixel level.

entities.name: DXGI_MODE_SCANLINE_ORDER
entities.description: Specifies the scanline ordering for a display mode.

entities.name: DXGI_OFFER_RESOURCE_PRIORITY
entities.description: 标识在调用IDXGIDevice2::OfferResources方法提供资源时，资源内容的重要性级别
entities.syntax: typedef enum _DXGI_OFFER_RESOURCE_PRIORITY {

entities.name: DXGI_OFFER_RESOURCE_PRIORITY_LOW
entities.description: 值：1。资源优先级较低。操作系统先放弃低优先级资源，然后再放弃具有较高优先级的其他资源。如果资源没有有用内容，则将其标记为低优先级是一种很好的编程做法。
entities.remarks: 优先级确定操作系统放弃提供的资源的可能性。 首先放弃优先级较低的资源。

entities.name: DXGI_OFFER_RESOURCE_PRIORITY_HIGH
entities.description: High priority level for offering DXGI resources

entities.name: DXGI_OUTDUPL_POINTER_SHAPE_TYPE_MONOCHROME
entities.description: 值： 0x1 指针类型是单色鼠标指针，它是单色位图。 位图的大小由宽度和高度指定，以每像素 1 位 (bpp) 设备独立位图 (DIB) 格式和掩码，后跟相同大小的另一个 1 bpp DIB 格式 XOR 掩码。

entities.name: DXGI_OUTDUPL_POINTER_SHAPE_TYPE_MASKED_COLOR
entities.description: 值：0x4。表示指针类型是掩码颜色鼠标指针。掩码颜色鼠标指针是一个32bpp ARGB格式位图，其掩码值以alpha位为单位。唯一允许的掩码值为0和0xFF。当掩码值为0时，RGB值应替换屏幕像素。当掩码值为0xFF时，对RGB值和屏幕像素执行XOR操作，结果将替换屏幕像素。

entities.name: DXGI_OUTDUPL_POINTER_SHAPE_TYPE_COLOR
entities.description: 值： 0x2 指针类型是颜色鼠标指针，它是颜色位图。 位图的大小由宽度和高度指定，采用 32 bpp ARGB DIB 格式。

entities.name: DXGI_SCALING
entities.description: 标识当后台缓冲区大小与目标输出大小不匹配时调整大小的行为。

entities.name: DXGI_SCALING_ASPECT_RATIO_STRETCH
entities.description: Specifies that DXGI should stretch the back buffer to fit the output window while preserving the aspect ratio, preferring horizontal fill.
entities.remarks: Only supported for flip presentation model swap chains created with DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_SEQUENTIAL or DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_DISCARD values. Pass these values when calling IDXGIFactory2::CreateSwapChainForHwnd, "IDXGIFactory2"::CreateSwapChainForCoreWindow, or IDXGIFactory2::CreateSwapChainForComposition.

entities.name: DXGI_SCALING_STRETCH
entities.description: Specifies DXGI scaling behavior to stretch back buffer contents to fit the presentation target size. This is the implicit behavior of DXGI when calling IDXGIFactory::CreateSwapChain method.

entities.name: DXGI_SCALING_NONE
entities.description: 值：1。当呈现目标大小不等于后台缓冲区大小时，指示DXGI不进行任何缩放显示。后台缓冲区和呈现目标的上边缘对齐。如果窗口具有WS_EX_LAYOUTRTL样式，则右边缘对齐；否则左边缘对齐。交换链后台缓冲区之外的目标区域用IDXGISwapChain1::SetBackgroundColor指定的背景色填充。

entities.name: DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FULLSCREEN_DESC
entities.description: Describes full-screen mode for a swap chain.

entities.name: DXGI_ERROR_INVALID_CAL
entities.description: DXGI错误代码，表示无效的计算(calculation)或调用。

parameters.name: refiid
parameters.description: 指向由 ppUnk 参数引用的 CoreWindow 对象的全局唯一标识符 (GUID) 的指针。[out] ppUnk 指向接收 指向 CoreWindow 对象的指针的变量的指针。

parameters.name: pDesc
parameters.description: 指向描述交换链 的DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_DESC1 结构的指针。

parameters.name: pDesc
parameters.description: 指向描述全屏交换链 DXGI_SWAP_CHAIN_FULLSCREEN_DESC 结构的指针。

parameters.name: pHwnd
parameters.description: 指向接收交换链对象的 HWND 的变量的指针。

parameters.name: ppRestrictToOutput
parameters.description: 指向缓冲区的指针，该缓冲区接收指向限制输出的 IDXGIOutput 接口的指针。 应用程序 在调用 IDXGIFactory2：：CreateSwapChainForHwnd、IDXGIFactory2：： CreateSwapChainForCoreWindow 或 IDXGIFactory2：： CreateSwapChainForComposition 方法时将此指针传递给 IDXGIOutput，以创建交换链。

parameters.name: pRotation
parameters.description: 指向变量的指针，该变量接收 DXGI_MODE_ROTATION类型的值，该值指定交换链的后台 缓冲区的旋转。

entities.name: DXGI_ERROR_SESSION_DISCONNECTED
entities.description: DXGI错误代码，表示会话已断开连接。DXGI_ERROR主题中介绍了其他错误代码。

entities.name: DXGI_ENUM_MODES_STEREO
entities.description: Flags constant. If DXGI_ENUM_MODES_STEREO is specified, stereo modes will be included in the returned mode list pointed to by pDesc parameter. This means the method will return both stereo and mono modes.

entities.name: DXGI_ERROR_WAIT_TIMEOUT
entities.description: 表示超时间隔在下一个桌面帧可用之前已过。当应用程序调用AcquireNextFrame时可能返回此错误。

parameters.description: 调用方传递给 pMoveRectBuffer 参数的缓冲区的大小（以字节为单位）。[out] pMoveRectBuffer 指向 DXGI_OUTDUPL_MOVE_RECT 结构数组的指针，这些结构标识桌面框架的移动矩形区域。

parameters.name: pMoveRectsBufferSizeRequired
parameters.description: 指向一个变量的指针，该变量接收 GetFrameMoveRects 在 pMoveRectBuffer 的缓冲区中存储有关移动区域的信息所需的字节数。 有关返回所需缓冲区大小的详细信息，请参阅备注。

entities.name: DXGI_SHARED_RESOURCE_READ
entities.description: Specifies read access to a shared resource.

parameters.description: 全局唯一标识符 (请求的接口类型的 GUID) 。[out] ppParentResource 指向缓冲区的指针，该缓冲区接收指向子资源图面的父资源对象的指针。[out] pSubresourceIndex 指向接收子资源图面索引的变量的指针。

entities.name: DXGI_SHARED_RESOURCE_WRITE

entities.name: DXGI_PRESENT_STEREO_TEMPORARY_MONO
entities.description: Flag for IDXGISwapChain1::Present1 method. All windowed swap chains support temporary mono. Full-screen swap chains may optionally support it as not all hardware efficiently supports temporary mono in full-screen mode.

parameters.name: SyncInterval
parameters.description: 一个整数，指定如何将框架的呈现与垂直空白同步。 对于位块传输 (bitblt) 模型 (DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_DISCARD 或 DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_SEQUENTIAL) ，值为： 0 - 演示文稿立即发生，没有同步。 1 到 4 - 同步 n个垂直空白之后的演示文稿。 对于翻转模型 (DXGI_SWAP_EFFECT_FLIP_SEQUENTIAL) ，值为： 0 - 取消之前显示的帧上的剩余时间，如果较新的帧排队，则放弃此帧。 1 到 4 - 同步至少 n 个 垂直空白的演示文稿。 有关显示同步间隔值如何影响翻转演示文稿队列的示例，请参阅备注。 如果更新区域跨多个输出 (每个输出由 IDXGIOutput1) 表示， 则 Present1 将执行与包含 目标窗口工作区最大子矩形的输出的同步。 PresentFlags 包含交换链表示选项的整数值。 这些选项由 DXGI_PRESENT 常量定义。

parameters.name: pPresentParameters
parameters.description: 指向 DXGI_PRESENT_PARAMETERS 结构的指针，该结构描述要呈现的帧的更新矩形和滚 动信息。

entities.name: DXGI_PRESENT_DO_NOT_SEQUENCE
entities.description: Specifies that when calling IDXGISwapChain1::Present1, only the background color should be changed without altering the swap chain's display content.

entities.description: Flag specified during device creation (e.g. with D3D11CreateDevice). Indicates debug mode for Direct3D 11 device.

entities.name: DXGI_FRAME_PRESENTATION_MODE_COMPOSITION_FAILURE
entities.description: 值为3，表示在具有硬件内容保护的交换链中出现问题导致内容保护失效，通常是由于系统耗尽了硬件保护的内存。应用需要减少硬件保护内存使用量或停止使用硬件保护。
entities.remarks: 此枚举由 DXGI_FRAME_STATISTICS_MEDIA 结构使用。

entities.name: DXGI_FRAME_PRESENTATION_MODE_COMPOSED
entities.description: 值：0。指定呈现模式是合成图面，这意味着每次输出刷新（例如60Hz）进行一次从YUV到RGB的转换。返回此值时，媒体应用应停止使用解码交换链，并自行执行YUV到RGB的转换，从而将YUV转换为RGB的频率降低到每个视频帧一次。

entities.name: DXGI_MATRIX_3X2_F
entities.description: 表示3x2变换矩阵。与GetMatrixTransform和SetMatrixTransform一起使用，用于指定SwapChainPanel交换链的缩放和变换转换。

parameters.name: hEvent
parameters.description: 操作系统在硬件内容保护发生拆解时设置的事件对象的句柄。 CreateEvent 或 OpenEvent 函数返回此句柄。[out] pdwCookie 类型： DWORD* 指向键值的指针，应用程序可以传递给 IDXGIAdapter3：： UnregisterHardwareContentProtectionTeardownStatus 方法，以取消注册 hEvent 指定的 通知事件。返回值类型： HRESULT 如果该方法成功，则返回 S_OK。 否则，将返回 HRESULT 错误代码。

parameters.name: hEvent

parameters.name: NodeIndex

entities.description: DXGI颜色空间常量，表示RGB全范围(0-255)的线性gamma(1.0)色彩空间，使用BT.709色度坐标。

entities.name: DXGI_HDR_METADATA_HDR10
entities.description: 结构 介绍 HDR10 的元数据，在使用高效视频编码 (HEVC) 压缩视频时使用。 这用于描述用于掌握内容的显示器的功能以及内容的亮度值。
entities.remarks: 此结构表示用于 HEVC 的 HDR10 元数据的定义，而不是 ST.2086 的 HDR10 元数据。 它们密切相关，但定义不同。 示例：采用 DCI-P3 颜色主色和 D65 白点、最大亮度为 1000 尼特、最小亮度为 0.001 尼特的母版显示;内容的最大亮度为 2000 尼特，最大帧平均亮度 (MaxFALL) 为 500 尼特。 C++ RedPrimary[0] = 0.680 * 50000; RedPrimary[1] = 0.320 * 50000; GreenPrimary[0] = 0.265 * 50000; GreenPrimary[1] = 0.690 * 50000; BluePrimary[0] = 0.150 * 50000; BluePrimary[1] = 0.060 * 50000; WhitePoint[0] = 0.3127 * 50000; WhitePoint[1] = 0.3290 * 50000; MaxMasteringLuminance = 1000; MinMasteringLuminance = 0.001 * 10000; MaxContentLightLevel = 2000; MaxFrameAverageLightLevel = 500; 此结构与 SetHDRMetaData 方法结合使用。

members.name: RedPrimary[2]
members.description: CIE1931 颜色空间中红色值的色度坐标。 索引 0 包含 X 坐标，索引 1 包含 Y 坐标。 值规 范化为 50，000。 GreenPrimary[2] CIE1931 颜色空间中绿色值的色度坐标。 索引 0 包含 X 坐标，索引 1 包含 Y 坐标。 值规 范化为 50，000。 BluePrimary[2] CIE1931 颜色空间中蓝色值的色度坐标。 索引 0 包含 X 坐标，索引 1 包含 Y 坐标。 值规 范化为 50，000。 WhitePoint[2] CIE1931 颜色空间中白点的色度坐标。 索引 0 包含 X 坐标，索引 1 包含 Y 坐标。 值规范化为 50，000。

members.name: MaxMasteringLuminance
members.description: 用于掌握内容的显示的最大尼特数。 值以整数为单位。 MinMasteringLuminance 用于掌握内容的显示器的最小尼特数。 值为 nit (0.0001 nit) 的 1/10000。 MaxContentLightLevel 最大内容浅色级别 (MaxCLL) 。 这是与内容中任意位置使用的最亮像素对应的 nit 值。 MaxFrameAverageLightLevel 最大帧平均光度 (MaxFALL) 。 这是对应于内容中任意位置具有最亮平均亮度的帧的平均 亮度的 nit 值。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8_UNORM
entities.description: 8-bit single-channel format with normalized unsigned integer values (0-255 mapped to 0.0-1.0). Supported view types: SRV, RTV, UAV. For luminance data view, mapping is Y->R8. For chrominance data view, mapping is U->R8 and V->G8. Width and height must be even. Direct3D 11 staging resources and initData parameters use (rowPitch * (height + (height / 2))) bytes. First (SysMemPitch * height) bytes are Y plane, remaining (SysMemPitch * (height / 2)) bytes are UV plane. Direct3D 11.1: This value is not supported prior to Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_420_OPAQUE
entities.description: Value: 106. An 8-bit per channel planar YUV 4:2:0 video resource format. This format is subsampled where each pixel has its own Y value, but each 2x2 pixel block shares U and V values. Resources created with this format must have width and height that are multiples of 2. Any RECT used with this format must have left, right, top and bottom members that are multiples of 2. Unlike DXGI_FORMAT_NV12, the data layout in resources is completely opaque to applications. Applications cannot CPU-map resources to access data. Shaders cannot use this format. This allows support for legacy hardware with non-NV12 4:2:0 layouts (like YV12) and enables better implementations on new hardware when standard layout isn't required. For YUV formats in video rendering, see Recommended 8-Bit YUV Formats for Video Rendering. Direct3D 11 staging resources and initData parameters use (rowPitch * (height + (height / 2))) bytes. Applications using YUV 4:2:0 must map luma (Y) and chroma (UV) planes separately by calling ID3D12Device::CreateShaderResourceView twice with 1-channel and 2-channel formats respectively. Direct3D 11.1: This value is not supported prior to Windows 8.

entities.description: DXGI format value indicating sampler feedback mip region usage is opaque

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_FORCE_UINT
entities.description: 值：0xffffffff 强制此枚举编译为大小为 32 位。 如果没有此值，某些编译器将允许此枚举编译为 32 位以外的大 小。 不使用此值。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R32G32B32A32_SINT
entities.description: A four-component, 128-bit signed integer format supporting 32 bits per channel including alpha.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R32G32B32_SINT
entities.description: 32-bit signed integer format with three components (96-bits total) per color channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16B16A16_SINT
entities.description: Four-component 64-bit signed integer format supporting 16 bits per channel (including alpha). DXGI_FORMAT enumeration value (14).

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R32G32_TYPELESS
entities.description: A two-component, 64-bit typeless format that supports 32-bit red channel and 32-bit green channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R32G32_SINT
entities.description: A two-component 64-bit signed integer format that supports 32 bits for the red channel and 32 bits for the green channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_X32_TYPELESS_G8X24_UINT
entities.description: A 32-bit typeless component, and two unsigned integer components (with additional 32 bits). This format leaves 32 bits unused, uses 8 bits for green channel, and leaves 24 bits unused.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R10G10B10A2_TYPELESS
entities.description: A four-component, 32-bit typeless format that supports 10 bits for each color channel and 2 bits for alpha.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R10G10B10A2_UINT
entities.description: A four-component, 32-bit unsigned-integer format that supports 10 bits for each color channel (red, green, blue) and 2 bits for alpha. Supported view types are SRV and UAV. Direct3D 11.1: This value is not supported until Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R11G11B10_FLOAT
entities.description: Three partial-precision floating-point numbers encoded into a single 32-bit value (a variant of s10e5 format). No sign bit, each channel has a 5-bit biased (15) exponent, 6-bit mantissa for R and G channels, and 5-bit mantissa for B channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_TYPELESS
entities.description: 支持每个通道8位（包括alpha）的四分量32位无类型格式。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8B8A8_SINT
entities.description: A four-component 32-bit signed integer format that supports 8 bits per channel including alpha.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16_TYPELESS
entities.description: 值：33。一种双分量32位无类型格式，红色通道和绿色通道各占16位。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16_UINT
entities.description: A DXGI format enumeration value representing a two-component, 16-bit unsigned integer format (R16G16_UINT). Supported view types are SRV, RTV and UAV. For luminance data view, the mapping is Y->R16. For chrominance data view, the mapping is U->R16 and V->G16. Width and height must be even. Direct3D 11 staging resources and initData parameters for this format use (rowPitch * (height + (height / 2))) bytes.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16G16_SINT
entities.description: A two-component, 32-bit signed integer format that supports 16 bits for the red channel and 16 bits for the green channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R32_FLOAT
entities.description: 一种单组件32位浮点格式，支持红色通道的32位数据。值为41。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R32_SINT
entities.description: A single-component 32-bit signed integer format that supports 32 bits for the red channel. Value: 43.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_X24_TYPELESS_G8_UINT
entities.description: 值：47 一种 32 位格式，包含 24 位单分量无类型格式，另外还有 8 位无符号整数组件。 此格式有 24 位未使用，8 位绿色通道。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8_TYPELESS
entities.description: A two-component, 16-bit typeless format that supports 8 bits for the red channel and 8 bits for the green channel. Value: 48

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8_UINT
entities.description: A two-component, 16-bit unsigned integer format that supports 8 bits for the red channel and 8 bits for the green channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8G8_SINT
entities.description: A two-component, 16-bit signed integer format that supports 8 bits for the red channel and 8 bits for the green channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_D16_UNORM
entities.description: 值：55。单分量16位无符号规范化整数格式，支持16位深度。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16_UNORM
entities.description: 16-bit unsigned normalized integer format. Runtime does not enforce minimum 6 bits to be 0 (since this video resource format uses 16-bit for 10-bit format). Application shader code must manually enforce this if needed.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16_UINT
entities.description: A single-component 16-bit unsigned integer format that supports 16 bits for the red channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16_SNORM
entities.description: A single-component 16-bit signed normalized integer format that supports 16 bits for the red channel. Value: 58

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R16_SINT
entities.description: A single-component, 16-bit signed integer format that supports 16 bits for the red channel. Value: 59

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8_UINT
entities.description: A single-component 8-bit unsigned integer format that supports 8 bits for the red channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8_SNORM
entities.description: A single-component 8-bit signed normalized integer format that supports 8 bits for the red channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R8_SINT
entities.description: A single-component 8-bit signed integer format that supports 8 bits for the red channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_A8_UNORM
entities.description: 8-bit unsigned normalized integer format containing only the alpha component. Value: 65.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_R1_UNORM
entities.description: A single-component, 1-bit unsigned normalized integer format that supports 1-bit for the red channel.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_G8R8_G8B8_UNORM
entities.description: Value: 69. A four-component, 32-bit unsigned normalized integer format. This packed RGB format is similar to the YUY2 format. Each 32-bit block describes a pair of pixels: (R8, G8, B8) and (R8, G8, B8) where R8/B8 values are repeated and G8 values are unique for each pixel. Width must be even.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_BC1_UNORM
entities.description: Four-component block-compression format (value: 71). For information about block-compression formats, see Texture Block Compression in Direct3D 11.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_BC2_TYPELESS
entities.description: 值为73的四分量无类型块压缩格式。有关块压缩格式的信息，请参阅Direct3D 11中的纹理块压缩。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_BC3_TYPELESS
entities.description: Value: 76. Four-component typeless block-compression format. For information about block-compression formats, see Texture Block Compression in Direct3D 11.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_BC3_UNORM
entities.description: Four-component block-compression format (value: 77). For information about block-compression formats, see Texture Block Compression in Direct3D 11.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_BC4_TYPELESS
entities.description: 单组件无类型块压缩格式 (值:79)。有关块压缩格式的信息，请参阅Direct3D 11中的纹理块压缩。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_BC4_SNORM
entities.description: Value: 81. Single-component block-compression format with signed normalized values. For information about block-compression formats, see Texture Block Compression in Direct3D 11.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_BC5_SNORM
entities.description: 双组件块压缩格式(SNORM)，值为84。关于块压缩格式的详细信息，请参考Direct3D 11中的纹理块压缩。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_B5G5R5A1_UNORM
entities.description: A four-component, 16-bit unsigned normalized integer format that supports 5 bits per color channel and 1-bit alpha. Note: This format was defined for DXGI but not supported by Direct3D 10/10.1/11 devices until Direct3D 11.1 in Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_B8G8R8X8_UNORM
entities.description: A four-component, 32-bit unsigned normalized integer format that supports 8 bits per color channel (blue, green, red) and 8 unused bits.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_B8G8R8A8_UNORM_SRGB
entities.description: 值：91 一种四分量32位无符号规范化标准RGB格式，支持每个通道(包括alpha)的8位。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_B8G8R8X8_TYPELESS
entities.description: Value: 92. A four-component, 32-bit typeless format that supports 8 bits per color channel with 8 bits unused.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_B8G8R8X8_UNORM_SRGB
entities.description: 值：93。一种四分量、32位无符号规范化标准RGB格式，每个颜色通道(B,G,R)支持8位，8位(X)未使用。支持sRGB色彩空间。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_BC6H_SF16
entities.description: 值：96，块压缩格式。有关块压缩格式的信息，请参阅Direct3D 11中的纹理块压缩

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_BC7_UNORM
entities.description: 值：98，块压缩格式。有关块压缩格式的信息，请参阅Direct3D 11中的纹理块压缩。

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_Y410
entities.description: 10-bit per channel packed YUV 4:4:4 video resource format (value: 101). Valid view format for this video resource.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_Y416
entities.description: A 16-bit per channel packed YUV 4:4:4 video resource format with valid view formats.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_NV12
entities.description: Value: 103. Represents the most common YUV 4:2:0 video resource format. This format specifies valid luminance data view format for video resources.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_P010
entities.description: 10-bit per channel planar YUV 4:2:0 video resource format (value 104). This format is valid for luminance data view formats.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_P016
entities.description: 16-bit per channel planar YUV 4:2:0 video resource format (value: 105). This is the valid luminance data view format for this video resource format.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_Y210
entities.description: Value: 108. A 10-bit per channel packed YUV 4:2:2 video resource format. Valid view formats for this video resource format.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_Y216
entities.description: 16-bit YUV format with Y0 mapped to R16, U to G16, Y1 to B16, and V to A16. Supported view types: SRV and UAV. Width must be even. Direct3D 11.1: This value is not supported prior to Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_NV11
entities.description: Value: 110. Most common planar YUV 4:1:1 video resource format. This format specifies a valid luminance data view format.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_AI44
entities.description: 4-bit palettized YUV format typically used for DVD sub-pictures. For details about YUV formats for video presentation, see Recommended 8-Bit YUV Formats for Video Rendering. Direct3D 11.1: This value is not supported until Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_IA44
entities.description: 4-bit palettized YUV format typically used for DVD subpictures. For details about YUV formats for video presentation, see Recommended 8-Bit YUV Formats for Video Rendering. Direct3D 11.1: This value is not supported before Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_P8
entities.description: Value: 113. An 8-bit palettized format used for RGB data when processing ISDB-T data, and for YUV data when processing BluRay data. For details about YUV formats for video rendering, see Recommended 8-Bit YUV Formats for Video Rendering. Direct3D 11.1: This value is not supported prior to Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_A8P8
entities.description: 8-bit alpha with 8-bit palette format (value: 114). Used for palettized YUV data when processing BluRay data. Direct3D 11.1: This value is not supported prior to Windows 8.

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_V208
entities.description: 8位YCbCrA 4:4:4视频格式，值为131

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_V408
entities.description: 8位YCbCrA 4:4:4:4呈现格式，值为132

entities.name: DXGI_FORMAT_A4B4G4R4_UNORM
entities.description: A four-component, 16-bit unsigned normalized integer format that supports 4 bits per channel including alpha (value 191). Byte ordering (LSB/MSB): Most formats have byte-aligned components arranged in C array order (least address). For formats without power-of-2 aligned components, the first named component is placed in the least significant bits.

entities.name: D3D10_BIND_CONSTANT_BUFFER
entities.description: Specifies the resource will be a constant buffer. Part of D3D10_BIND_FLAG enumeration.

entities.name: _TYPELESS
entities.description: DXGI_FORMAT枚举成员，表示无类型数据格式。用于创建无类型资源，其大小已知但数据类型未完全定义。当绑定到着色器时由应用程序指定解释方式。

entities.name: ACTIVATION_CONTEXT_ASSEMBLY_DETAILED_INFORMATION
entities.description: Contains detailed information about an assembly in the activation context. Used by QueryActCtxW function.
